headline: Zacks Industry Outlook Highlights Hannover Ruck, eHealth, Willis Towers Watson and Aon plc
summary: HVRRY, EHTH, WTW and AON are navigating consolidation and digital shifts as Insurance Brokerage lags, with 2026 earnings outlook under pressure.
